LABEL: SIGNUP_OK
lifted_nl: whenever signup(u,p) is called, it must hold that u ∉ dom(R); always after signup(u,p) succeeds, R becomes R ∪ {u → hash(p)}
Postcondition: R'=R ∪ {u → hash(p)} AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: LOGIN_OK
lifted_nl: whenever login(u,p) is called, it must hold that hash(p) = R(u) ∧ u ∉ dom(T)
Postcondition: T'=T ∪ {tok → u} AND R'=R AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: ONBOARDING_STEP_K_OK
lifted_nl: whenever submit_onboarding_step_k(p) is called, it must hold that p's onboarding state = STEP_k and p's session token is in dom(T); always after submit_onboarding_step_k(p) succeeds, p's onboarding state becomes STEP_k+1; after Step 6, state becomes ONBOARD_DONE
Precondition: Qual(p) = STEP_k ∧ p's session token ∈ dom(T)
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual ∪ {p → (k=6 ? ONBOARD_DONE : STEP_(k+1))} AND T'=T AND R'=R AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: INITIAL_QUALIFICATION_APPLICATION_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Initial Qualification Application(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = Q_INIT and always after Initial Qualification Application(p) succeeds, QualState(p) becomes UNDER_EXAM
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual union {p|->UNDER_EXAM} AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: SEMI_QUALIFY_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Semi-Qualify(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = UNDER_EXAM and always after Semi-Qualify(p) succeeds, QualState becomes TRAINING
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual union {p|->TRAINING} AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: FULLY_QUALIFY_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Fully-Qualify(p) is called, QualState must hold that QualState = UNDER_EXAM and always after Fully-Qualify(p) succeeds, QualState becomes ACTIVE
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual union {p|->ACTIVE} AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: DISQUALIFY_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Disqualify(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = UNDER_EXAM; always after Disqualify(p) succeeds, QualState(p) becomes REJECTED
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual [[p:=REJECTED]] AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: SUSPEND_PLUMBER_OK
lifted_nl: whenever SuspendPlumber(p) is called, it must hold that QualState(p) = ACTIVE; always after SuspendPlumber(p) succeeds, QualState becomes SUSPENDED
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual [[p:=SUSPENDED]] AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: REINSTATE_PLUMBER_OK
lifted_nl: whenever ReinstatePlumber(p) is called, it must hold that QualState = SUSPENDED; always after ReinstatePlumber(p) succeeds, QualState becomes ACTIVE
Postcondition: Qual'=Qual [[p:=ACTIVE]] AND T'=T AND C'=C AND Compl'=Compl

LABEL: RAISE_COMPLAINT_OK
lifted_nl: always after RaiseComplaint() succeeds, Compl is added to ComplaintRecord with state RAISED
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {complId|->ComplaintRecord(state=RAISED)}

LABEL: ASSIGN_PLUMBER_OK
lifted_nl: whenever AssignPlumberToComplaint() is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = RAISED and Qual(plumber) = ACTIVE and after succeeds, Compl[complId].plumber becomes p and Compl[complId].state becomes ASSIGNED
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {complId|->ComplaintRecord(plumber=p, state=ASSIGNED)}

LABEL: PLUMBER_ACCEPTS_ASSIGNMENT_OK
lifted_nl: whenever PlumberAcceptsAssignment(p, complId) is called, it must hold that Compl[complId].state = ASSIGNED and Compl[complId].plumber = p and after succeeds, Compl[complId].state becomes UNDER_EXAM_C
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {complId|->ComplaintRecord(state=UNDER_EXAM_C)}

LABEL: PLUMBER_REJECTS_ASSIGNMENT_OK
lifted_nl: whenever PlumberRejectsAssignment(p,complaint) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord[complaint].state = ASSIGNED and ComplaintRecord[complaint].plumber = p; always after PlumberRejectsAssignment(p,complaint) succeeds, ComplaintRecord[complaint].state becomes RAISED and ComplaintRecord[complaint].plumber becomes null
Postcondition: Compl'=Compl union {complaint|->ComplaintRecord[complaint] with state=RAISED and plumber=null} AND C'=C AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual

LABEL: RAISE_QUOTATION_OK
lifted_nl: whenever RaiseQuotation(complaint) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord[complaint].state = UNDER_EXAM_C; always after RaiseQuotation(c,p,m) succeeds, ComplaintRecord becomes ComplaintRecord ∪ {quotation ↦ items, state ↦ QUOTATION_RAISED}
Postcondition: Compl'=Compl union {complaint|->ComplaintRecord[complaint] with quotation=items and state=QUOTATION_RAISED} AND C'=C AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual

LABEL: APPROVE_QUOTATION_OK
lifted_nl: whenever ApproveQuotation(c,p,m) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord.state = QUOTATION_RAISED; always after ApproveQuotation(c,p,m) succeeds, ComplaintRecord.state becomes UNDER_EXEC
Postcondition: Compl'=Compl union {complaint|->Compl[complaint] with state=UNDER_EXEC} AND C'=C AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual

LABEL: REJECT_QUOTATION_ABANDON_OK
lifted_nl: whenever RejectQuotationAbandon() is called, it must hold that QualState = QUOTATION_RAISED; always after RejectQuotationAbandon() succeeds, QualState becomes ABANDONED
Postcondition: C'=C AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {complaintId|->ABANDONED}

LABEL: MARK_TASK_COMPLETED_OK
lifted_nl: whenever MarkTaskCompleted() is called, it must hold that QualState = UNDER_EXEC; always after Mark Task Completed, ComplaintRecord becomes PAYMENT_PENDING
Postcondition: C'=C AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {complaintId|->PAYMENT_PENDING}

LABEL: MAKE_PAYMENT_OK
lifted_nl: whenever Make Payment is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord = PAYMENT_PENDING; always after Make Payment succeeds, ComplaintRecord becomes DONE
Postcondition: C'=C AND T'=T AND Qual'=Qual AND Compl'=Compl union {complaintId|->DONE}

LABEL: SUBMIT_FEEDBACK_OK
lifted_nl: whenever SubmitFeedback(c,p) is called, it must hold that ComplaintRecord(p) = 'DONE' and always after SubmitFeedback(c,p) succeeds, Compl(p) is added to map ComplaintRecord and ComplaintRecord(p) becomes ComplaintRecord(p)
Postcondition: C'=C AND P'=P AND M'=M AND Compl'=Compl
